name: hero-focal
summary: Added hero focal piece per design-note: slate pedestal + brushed-metal cap + 4-wall glass display case (opacity 0.18) + glass top + cyan logo cube floating inside. Cube rotates on Y-axis only at 0.4 rad/s (≤0.5 spec cap). Rotation gated on prefers-reduced-motion via window.matchMedia (mirrors BookRoom globe intent). No emissiveIntensity per-frame changes; no scale per-frame changes; static emissive=0.9 on cube. New playerOnly collider 'pr-hero' registered at (ox, oz+2.05) with hx=hz=0.30. Build green.
